# opsboard-status-update

Record durable, non-secret OPSBOARD project status in git-bug and Git. Use when an agent starts, hands off, becomes blocked, requests review, completes work, or needs to make dashboard status accurate.

This prompt delegates to the agent skill at `../skills/opsboard-status-update/`.

## Skill Location

- **Path:** `../skills/opsboard-status-update/`
- **Manifest:** `../skills/opsboard-status-update/SKILL.md`

## Usage

Invoke this skill by typing `/opsboard-status-update` in the Copilot chat.
